answer:
We have heard of heroes in ages past,
of twelve true thanes under the turning stars,
the Lord's own champions. Their glory lived on
in the grim struggle where standards clashed.
Their lots were laid out as the Lord Himself,
Heaven's High King, handed them their fates.
